calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael S. Keck, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Melinda Cuthbert, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Sandip Ray.
Default was entered against defendant on February 2, 2009.
Amended declaration of Michael S. Keck re: interest in support of plaintiff's request for default judgment was filed today, April 16, 2009.
Declaration of Melinda Cuthbert in support of request for entry of default judgment was filed today, April 16, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Melinda Cuthbert, and against the Defaulted Defendant Sandip Ray as follows:

Damages/Principal - $65,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,701.84.
Costs - $414.56, for a total judgment in the amount of $70,916.40.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2009 Continued To May-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Continued To Mar-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
